title: Total Budget Allocated Per Scheme Per Year
description: Write a query to get the total allocated_budget_cr for each combination of year and scheme_name from scheme_budget_utilization. Alias the sum as total_allocated. Group by year and scheme_name.

schema: CREATE TABLE scheme_budget_utilization (scheme_id TEXT, scheme_name TEXT, ministry TEXT, state_code TEXT, year INTEGER, allocated_budget_cr REAL, utilized_budget_cr REAL)
seed: INSERT INTO scheme_budget_utilization VALUES ('SCH02','Jal Jeevan Mission','Jal Shakti','MH',2020,1180.6,1096.1)
INSERT INTO scheme_budget_utilization VALUES ('SCH02','Jal Jeevan Mission','Jal Shakti','MH',2021,3961.1,3760.8)
INSERT INTO scheme_budget_utilization VALUES ('SCH02','Jal Jeevan Mission','Jal Shakti','UP',2021,2100.0,1900.0)
testCases.solutionQuery: SELECT year, scheme_name, SUM(allocated_budget_cr) AS total_allocated FROM scheme_budget_utilization GROUP BY year, scheme_name

schema: CREATE TABLE scheme_budget_utilization (scheme_id TEXT, scheme_name TEXT, ministry TEXT, state_code TEXT, year INTEGER, allocated_budget_cr REAL, utilized_budget_cr REAL)
seed: INSERT INTO scheme_budget_utilization VALUES ('SCH04','State Skill Program','Skill','MH',2022,5000.0,4700.0)
testCases.solutionQuery: SELECT year, scheme_name, SUM(allocated_budget_cr) AS total_allocated FROM scheme_budget_utilization GROUP BY year, scheme_name
